name: pathway-claude-skills
description: Claude Code skills for the Pathway Design System (Ministry Brands Amplify). Covers the full component lifecycle from Figma handoff check through to a shipped component in GitHub and Storybook.

plugins.name: pathway
plugins.description: Five Pathway Design System skills bundled together: Component Readiness (audits Figma components), Component Spec Maker (drafts component specs from Figma), Spec Review (audits specs against system rules), Component Pipeline (ships components end-to-end), and Tokens Sync (syncs design tokens). The first three are safe for any designer; the last two are for the design system owner.
